Configuration.Name: SUNY Primo Search
Configuration.Author: Karen Okamoto
Configuration.Description: Searches SUNY library holdings via Ex Libris Primo. Automatically searches by ISBN/ISSN or title when a request is opened. Configurable for any SUNY campus by changing the base URL, view ID, and search scope.

Setting.name: AutoSearch
Setting.Description: Automatically search Primo when a request is opened.

Setting.name: PrimoBaseURL
Setting.Description: Base URL for the Primo instance. Change this for a different SUNY campus. Example: https://suny-pur.primo.exlibrisgroup.com

Setting.name: PrimoVID
Setting.Description: Primo View ID for your institution. Change this for a different SUNY campus. Example: 01SUNY_PUR:01SUNY_PUR

Setting.name: SearchScope
Setting.Description: Primo search scope. Controls which collections are searched. Common values: MyInst_and_CI, MyInstitution, Everything

Setting.name: DefaultSearchField
Setting.Description: Default search field for the keyword search button. Options: any, title, creator, isbn, issn, sub
